rows.name: sw4
rows.summary: A single-page app showcasing a group bike ride from Parsons WV to Thomas WV on the Blackwater Canyon trail, with a hero banner, three ride-section cards, and an email signup form.
rows.conversation:
[{"role":"user","content":"I want to create a single page app about joining a group bike ride up from Parsons WV to Thomas WV up the Blackwater Canyon trail. I want three sections. Section 1 is a hero banner with a picture of mountain biking and a title and body on the left. In section 2 I want a card group with 3 cards each describing a portion of the ride. In section 3 I want I quick sign up form asking for name and email address."},{"role":"assistant","content":"Great! That sounds like a fun project. rows.starter_prompt: Hi, I'm sw4 (sw4@s.com). I'm building a single-page app to promote a group bike ride up the Blackwater Canyon trail from Parsons WV to Thomas WV. I need three main sections: a hero banner with a mountain biking image, title, and description on the left side; a card group below that with three cards describing different portions of the ride; and a sign-up form at the bottom asking for name and email. The form needs to actually collect and store those submissions. I'm comfortable with Astro and want to get this running quickly. Let's start by building out the hero section and the card layout so I can see the page structure come together.
